caption:
Where to watch the fireworks in Dubai this DSF season? ⬇️

Tag your family and friends and bring them to these locations:

🎆15-24 December Dubai Festival City Mall - 9pm

🎇15-17, 22-24 and 29-30 December Hatta Sign - 8pm

🎆25 December - 4 January Al Seef - 9pm

🎇31 December Bluewaters and The Beach, JBR, Al Seef and Hatta - 11:59pm

🎆5-14  January Bluewaters and The Beach, JBR - 9pm 

🎥 in this reel: Dubai Festival City fireworks filmed at the bbq spot near Business Bay bridge.
